evidence: "Sort of like the Lord of the Flies, but set in space."
"Incredible battle sequences, a lot of surprises."
"If I can figure out the movie's ending, then for me it is not worth watching."
"There is just so much going on here in these twelve episodes, it is just incredible."
"Great movie, it's directed by Mel Gibson. Awesome story... The movie is very fast-paced..."
"Not only was the acting good, but it was more suspenseful than Aliens."
"great acting, great stunts and even though it was low budget the story worked for the most part."
"Incredible battle sequences, a lot of surprises."
"the story is so in depth and with a dynamite ending."
"Wow, a comic book movie, with a lot of great action and a really good story."
"I liked it, the show unfortunately and it was season 3..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and action genres, appreciating complex narratives and fast pacing. They value high production quality and enjoy visual spectacles, indicating a taste for engaging and emotionally resonant stories.
